title: Planning Snapshot Simplified Report Builder UX

layout_simplification.summary: Planning Snapshot now renders as a single vertical report builder instead of a multi-tab workflow.
default_order: Planning Snapshot header with top Print Executive Summary button
layout_simplification.empty_state: No-snapshot state now shows a simple message plus Go to Overview and Open Methodology buttons.

removed_or_reduced_top_level_tabs.replacement: Detailed legacy evidence remains available only through a collapsed Advanced saved evidence section.

print_button_visibility.top_button: A prominent Print Executive Summary button is visible in the Planning Snapshot header without scrolling.
print_button_visibility.bottom_button: A second Print Executive Summary button remains in the Executive Summary Preview controls.
print_button_visibility.target: Print uses the existing .print-report article while dashboard controls are marked no-print.

map_snapshot_cartography_changes.map_first: Selected Snapshot Map is shown directly after the compact library.
map_snapshot_cartography_changes.screenshot_behavior: Captured map screenshots render when available; unavailable screenshots show the existing clean placeholder and failure reason.
map_snapshot_cartography_changes.caption: Map snapshot captured from CFS Overview at the snapshot timestamp.
map_snapshot_cartography_changes.legend: Legend is generated from snapshot context for Model Lab, FEMA flood, schools, development activity, or a neutral active-layer fallback.
map_snapshot_cartography_changes.north_arrow: A compact north arrow appears over the map image/placeholder.
map_snapshot_cartography_changes.scale_note: Scale note states that scale is approximate because 3D scene perspective affects distance.
map_snapshot_cartography_changes.active_context: Active layer chips and selected parcel/context chips appear under the map.

report_controls_changes.panel: Customize Report is a compact checklist panel instead of large workflow cards.
report_controls_changes.clear_snapshot: Clear Snapshot remains available inside the compact controls.

explanation_toggle_behavior.default: Show explanation cards is off by default.
explanation_toggle_behavior.when_off: Executive Summary shows concise values and caveats only.
explanation_toggle_behavior.when_on: Explanation cards show only What it means, Source, and Caveat.

executive_summary_simplification.report_header: Cabarrus FutureScape / Planning Snapshot Executive Summary with generated and snapshot timestamps.
executive_summary_simplification.map_section: Printable map section includes image or placeholder, legend, north arrow, active layers, selected parcel, and scale note.
executive_summary_simplification.key_findings: Limited to up to five review flags.
executive_summary_simplification.evidence_sections: Included Evidence Sections are concise by default and obey report toggles.
executive_summary_simplification.model_lab: Model Lab snapshots show concise research band/context, top drivers, current best internal model, and required caveat. Extra rank/display/missing-data detail appears only when explanation cards are enabled.
executive_summary_simplification.caveats: Limitations/caveats remain in the printable report when selected.

existing_print_css_used: .print-report uses white background and dark text
map image, legend, north arrow, scale note, key findings, caveats, and recommendations remain inside the printable article
print_css_changes.browser_print_target_check: DOM smoke confirmed .print-report exists and does not include Snapshot Library, Customize Report, Delete/Open controls, or dashboard controls.

safety_verification.notes: Model Lab report wording remains internal research only, not exact probability, not official parcel score.

validation_results.python_compileall_app: exited 0; command reports no top-level app directory in this repo

smoke_test_results.print_preview_hides_dashboard_controls: verified by print-report/no-print DOM and CSS checks

remaining_known_issues: Browser smoke used existing saved snapshots in localStorage; one snapshot had a captured map and another had the clean unavailable placeholder.
Actual browser print dialog was not opened during automation, but print-target DOM and CSS behavior were verified.
